stat_block.craft_requirements: Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

abilities.effect: You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text: This white marble staff is carved into the figure of an abstract knight, its shield bearing the symbol of Lastwall, with a wickedly pointed sword made of dark wood raised high above its head. When you wield it as a weapon, it gains the versatile P trait and functions as a wooden stake, allowing you to use it to stake vampires, and your Strikes with the staff gain a +1 circumstance bonus to damage rolls against undead.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Necromancy
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the necromancy school of magic, typically involving forces of life and death.

traits.name: Staff
traits.text: This magic item holds spells of a particular theme and allows a spellcaster to cast additional spells by preparing the staff.

variants.name: Staff of Final Rest
variants.text:
* Cantrip disrupt undead
* 1st disrupting weapons, heal
* 2nd heal, gentle repose

variants.name: Staff of Final Rest (Greater)
variants.text:
The circumstance bonus to damage rolls is +2. 
* 3rd bind undead, disrupting weapons, heal
* 4th heal, holy cascade

variants.name: Staff of Final Rest (Major)
variants.text:
The circumstance bonus to damage rolls is +3. 
* 5th death ward, disrupting weapons, heal
* 6th field of life, heal, holy cascade
* 7th heal, holy cascade, sunburst
